title: Decide the over-temp ceiling + hysteresis values
body:
## What to build

This story needs a human design decision before any code can be written, so it is a Blocker, not an AFK or HIL story. It is deliberately kept out of `state:ready` (carries `ready-for-human`) so the selection engine never picks it up until a human resolves the open question and reclassifies it as AFK or HIL.

## Open Question

What coolant-valve over-temp ceiling and hysteresis band should the control loop use? This depends on the physical thermal mass and the valve response time, which are not yet characterized.

## Resolution

A human answers the question, then relabels this issue as `type:afk`/`type:hil`, adds acceptance criteria, and moves it to `state:ready`.

Depends on: None
